name: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Process Spawned by Utility
notes: This rule detects command line utilities used to create new processes. Such as 'echo', 'find', 'nmap', 'ncat', and 'zip'.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Process Spawned by Utility on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when Parent Process Name (custom) not equals Process Name (custom)
when any of Parent Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Utility with Execute Capabilities - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviourDefinition: Process Spawned by Utility on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when Parent Process Name (custom) not equals Process Name (custom)
AND when any of Parent Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Utility with Execute Capabilities - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
